title: The Wealth of Joy™
excerpt: Joy is the quiet confidence that hope is stronger than circumstance. The fifth and final chapter of the Foundational Wealth™ series on creating an Ennobled Life™.

title: The Wealth of Human Relationships™
excerpt: The richest lives are measured not by what we own, but by who walks beside us. Chapter Four of the Foundational Wealth™ series on the power of connection.

title: The Wealth of Compassion™
excerpt: Kindness is love made visible, enriching both the giver and the receiver. Chapter Three of the Foundational Wealth™ series on creating an Ennobled Life™.

title: The Wealth of Presence™
excerpt: Mindfulness is the courage to fully inhabit this moment — where wisdom grows and peace begins. Chapter Two of the Foundational Wealth™ series.

title: The Wealth of Courage™
excerpt: Courage is the first wealth we cultivate — the inner strength that turns fear into possibility and purpose into action. Chapter One of the Foundational Wealth™ series.

title: Foundational Wealth™: Building the Inner Riches That Create Lasting Prosperity
excerpt: The richest lives are built from the inside out. An introduction to the Foundational Wealth™ series — the enduring inner riches that no downturn can take away.
